subject: Vietnam footwear tariff rule published at 38%
claim_text: CBP published final rule imposing 38% tariff on Vietnamese footwear effective May 1.

subject: India machinery tariff law enacted at 18%
claim_text: Congress passed law imposing 18% tariff on industrial machinery imports from India.

subject: China electronics tariff investigation opened
claim_text: Section 301 investigation opened into Chinese semiconductor and electronics trade practices.

subject: New 145% tariff on Chinese textile goods
claim_text: Executive Order signed imposing 145% tariff on Chinese textile and fabric imports.

subject: USMCA auto parts tariff exemption rule proposed
claim_text: Commerce proposed removing USMCA tariff exemptions on certain auto parts from Mexico.

subject: 37% tariff on Bangladeshi textile imports
claim_text: Trade officials announced a 37% tariff on Bangladeshi textile and clothing imports.
